question: After I submit an SCF proposal, what does the review timeline look like — prescreen, track/panel review, community vote, results, KYC — and what is the round cadence and how long does each review stage take?

golden.answer:
Use `scout.getRfps`, `scout.searchResearch` to retrieve current, source-bounded results for this question. Report the source and as-of date. Treat returned rosters, ranks, counts, and current values as observations, not timeless facts.

Stable guardrails that remain in force: Separates rolling interest, eligibility/invitation, proposal, prescreen/panel, revision, Open-only vote, decision, and KYC. Gives the 2/1/1/1-week stage labels and keeps post-award payments separate.
keyFacts: Retrieves source-bounded live results via scout.getRfps, scout.searchResearch and reports their source and as-of date without freezing a roster, rank, count, or current value.
Separates rolling interest, eligibility/invitation, proposal, prescreen/panel, revision, Open-only vote, decision, and KYC.
Gives the 2/1/1/1-week stage labels and keeps post-award payments separate.
avoid: Do NOT call the interest form an open full proposal or apply the community vote to Integration/RFP.
Do NOT call acceptance a fourth deliverable milestone or invent a universal results week.
Do NOT state a specific current TVL, count, roster, rank, or value as a timeless fact.
golden.notes:
DIFFERENTIATED 2026-06-29: re-scoped to the review-side timeline + round cadence. Dropped the specific current-round number/deadline (owned by q-scf-current-round) and the applicant how-to-apply steps (owned by q-scf-how-to-apply). Build cadence ~6 weeks confirmed; exact per-stage review dates are not reliably published in static sources, so the rubric requires live checking rather than fabricated dates.
Also good if the answer: Distinguishes durable review mechanics/cadence from any one round's specific calendar dates. | Notes track-specific review variation: the Open Track has a community (NQG) vote, while Integration and RFP tracks are panel-oriented.
Golden cites: The live/current SCF Community Fund source for round deadlines, plus SCF handbook/process documentation for lifecycle mechanics.
GT-40 independently confirmed 2026-07-10. Exact calendar dates remain live; the stage-duration model and four-payment/three-deliverable distinction are the durable grading core.

corroboration.claim: Current Build lifecycle and stage durations
